name: Kochou Wang
description: One of the two-second-year prefects of the Black Dogs dormitory, and Teria's twin sister. She is known as the Pharmacy expert, with expertise regarding medicines. Despite their small stature, they are actually 14 years old, having skipped grades because of their intellect. Kochou is the more outgoing of the twins. It is hinted she has feelings for Airu Inuzuka, and affectionately calls him "A-chan." (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Koharu Ootori

name: Lizardon
description: Lizardon is a draconic, bipedal Pokémon. It is primarily orange with a cream underside from the chest to the tip of its tail. It has a long neck, small blue eyes, slightly raised nostrils, and two horn-like structures protruding from the back of its rectangular head. There are two fangs visible in the upper jaw when its mouth is closed. name: Luna Elegant
description: __Height:__ 153 cm She is the youngest of the ‘Three Saints’. She has magical talent that is rare even among the saints. Because of that rare talent she grew up as if she were a rose among weeds. She is extraordinarily selfish.

name: Lyria
description: A girl with special powers who runs away from the soldiers of the Erste Empire with her guardian Katalina before eventually meeting Gran. She has no memories of her life prior to being held captive by the Empire.

name: Mikoto Ochiai
description: Top of the class. When she wants to jump off the school roof, her physics teacher Jin Haiba hurries to her rescue and asks her: "Love me before you die." Her feelings for the sloppy teacher begin to rise.

name: Miyabi Itou
description: __Height:__ 156 cm (5'1") __Class:__ 2-C __Affiliation:__ Supernatural Studies Club Miyabi Itou is a girl that believes in the supernatural, that's why she also joins the Supernatural club. She later learns the secret of Yamada. Although Miyabi is a considerably attractive and cheerful girl, due to her being a fan of the supernatural phenomenons and alike, she is considered among her peers to be a fraud and liar. Because of this, she didn't have any friends at all.

name: Nina
description: Nina, a member of Demigod Race, was worshipped as a deity in her homeland until she is captured and sold into slavery, where she is put magic collar to restrain her and enslaved by Edgar Fromware. After being saved by Rein Shroud, she became his fifth contractual.

name: Pickle
description: A primitive form of man found perfectly preserved in a saline rock formation (hence he is 'pickled') this giant humanoid supposed lived originally in the Jurassic/Cretaceous era. He is revived from his long suspended animation in Baki 10.5, and is sent to Japan by Strydum after he defeats entire army battalions and even a high-tech exo-skeletal powersuit sent against him. name: Rem Kaginuki
description: __Height:__ 185 cm (6'1") The Student Council President of Shikou Gakuen. His real surname in the devil world is Arlond. name: Rilakkuma
description: A soft, toy-like brown bear whose interests are mostly limited to sleeping and eating. He appeared in front of Kaoru's apartment one day and started living with her afterwards.
